headline: Why Dover (DOV) Is Up 6.5% After Q1 Beat And Reaffirmed 2026 EPS Guidance – And What's Next
summary: Dover Corporation recently reported first-quarter 2026 results with sales rising to US$2,053.62 million and GAAP diluted EPS from continuing operations of US$1.76, while reaffirming full-year 2026 GAAP EPS guidance of US$8.92 to US$9.12 on expected revenue growth of 5% to 7%. The quarter also featured strong bookings across all segments, product launches in bioprocess connectors and wind turbine bearings, and partnerships in compact heat exchangers that reinforce Dover’s exposure to...

headline: DOV Q1 Deep Dive: Robust Order Growth and Infrastructure Demand Support Outlook
summary: Manufacturing company Dover (NYSE:DOV) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 10.1% year on year to $2.05 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.28 per share was in line with analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Why Are Dover (DOV) Shares Soaring Today
